release.title: New Update!
content: A new version is available, please update before continuing.
You will be redirected to the Github page for the download and some shortcut data will also be deleted.
news: * Moving the texts to the Github server and the ability to correct errors in the text on the fly.
* Saving configuration files to iCloud Drive.
* Changed the notification for inserting edited text.

chatGPT.info: Insert the text for which you want to add diacritics.
chatGPT.title: Done!
chatGPT.content: Diacritics have been added to the text, you have it saved in your clipboard.
